title: Worlds O' Plenty
description:
A curated modpack featuring all sorts of experiences!:
- Adventure!
- Decorations!
- Bosses and Mobs a plenty!
And of course...

*drum rolls*

Plenty of Worlds to explore!
body:
## Welcome to the Worlds O' Plenty Modpack!
Worlds O' Plenty is a curated Modpack by me, the name's LeeKan nice to meet you!!
This was originally created for personal uses, but I wanted to also share this enjoyment with you all as well!

![ModpackLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/087d141bb7c7c130c37e6f2f336d40efe6d0794c.png)

This modpack contains plenty of popular mods that work together to create a thoroughly enjoyable experience!

From the big mods that introduce entirely different worlds and biomes to the more humble mods that add in decorations and simple technological funs, it aims to be something you can enjoy but not be overwhelmed by!

## The Contents within!

With a collection that regularly gets updated, you can expect up to 400+ mods running! Of course there's also TONS of optimization mods to help cope with the amount of stuff going on here! Do still be careful with your RAM usage tho! 

### Some notable big mods include:

- Biomes O' Plenty
- Create
- The Aether (+ Addons)
- Ad Astra
- Applied Energistics 2
- The Cataclysm Mod

  ... And more!

### Important notes regarding this modpack!:

1. As this is a pretty big modpack, please remember to save up at least 4~6GB of RAM to use!
2. This is my first ever modpack so updates will be slow at times! As I am only one person and checking compatibilities takes some time!
3. If anything pops up, you can join my [Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/9yQjsP2zWe) I'll try my best to work out any flaws, issues or anything else!
4. I do hope you have fun!

And lastly some additional mods I'd like to recommend y'all have in here!:
- The [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) Mod.
- The [Umbral Skies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/umbral-skies) Mod.
- The [Twilight's Flavor & Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/twilight-delight) Mod.
- The [Twilight Forest: The Lost Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/twilight-forest-the-lost-blocks) Mod.
